title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.175 - Wage continuation plans by employer exempt
text:
354.175.  Wage continuation plans by employer exempt. — Provisions of sections 354.010 to 354.380 or of any law relating to insurance shall not apply to any employer's plan to insure the continued payment of wages or like compensation to employees during periods of sickness or disability.
(L. 1973 S.B. 3 § 34, A.L. 1983 H.B. 127)
